description.value: The creature can move through solid earth and rock at a rate equal to X metres per round. It leaves a tunnel behind it, which collapses at the end of the round after the creature passes through unless the material is suited to maintaining a tunnel (at the GM's discretion). X represents the creature's Burrower movement rate.

system.benefit: The creature can burrow through earth and rock at X metres per round, leaving a collapsing tunnel behind. X is the Burrower movement rate.
